form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 570m at Temora behind Scrutinise beaten 2.5 lengths (33.38). Won at his only start from this draw. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 8 over 570m at Temora behind Scrutinise beaten 2.5 lengths (33.38). Won at his only start from this draw. Go close again.

form.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and he is facing a tougher line up. Hard to have. Others look better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recent form has been ordinary and he is facing a tougher line up. Hard to have. Others look better.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including three wins. Has clocked an excellent 30.24 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but he does have a good record at the track and trip, including three wins. Has clocked an excellent 30.24 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was slow to begin; Hampered on the 1st turn.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (19.05) over 330m at Temora. Drawn awkwardly. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (19.05) over 330m at Temora. Drawn awkwardly. Must be included.

form.formComment: Steps up to 525m for the first time. Last appeared when second over 400m at this track a week ago. Has claims if at her best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Steps up to 525m for the first time. Last appeared when second over 400m at this track a week ago. Has claims if at her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the running rail on the turn out of the back straight.
Was tightened for room and checked shortly the start, losing momentum.
Stumbled shortly after the start and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 13 over 450m at Shepparton in a Mix 6/7. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 13 over 450m at Shepparton in a Mix 6/7. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Turned head outwards in home straight and eased approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last three starts, most recently over 525m at this track. Will not find this easy. Not keen.
